message:
feat: inject dynamic tool-boundary guardrails into system prompts

Agents now get a <tool_boundaries> block telling them explicitly what
they do NOT have access to. For example, the task-manager agent (which
only has task-cli) will be told it cannot delegate, exec, read_file,
or write files — reducing the chance of hallucinated tool calls.

The boundaries are computed from the agent's actual resolved tools,
not the spec, so workspace tools are accounted for.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
